summary: Completed testing of new SEO Engine features: password-protected Advanced Prompt tab, SERP Analysis with Apify integration, and XLSX upload functionality. Backend APIs working perfectly with 100% success rate.

ui_bugs.issue: Login form input selectors missing data-testid attributes for automated testing
